name: Nero Claudius (Swimsuit Caster)
description: Emperor umu is finally here! In honor of the Fate/Grand Order "Grand Nero Fest" event, I bring you Nero Claudius herself! Nero Claudius is finally here! This bot was tons of fun to make and play with, Nero is another one of my personal favorite servants from FGO and in honor of the Nero Fest event currently going on, I just had to make her! If you wish to get me to make a particular character, please leave a request in the comments below! If you have any feedback you would like to give me, do not hesitate to leave such feedback in the comments! Avatar art by Lack
creator: Rojack14
